## Summary

Describe the problem being solved and the change at a high level.

## Why This Change

Explain the user, operator, or contributor impact.

## Verification

- [ ] Add the exact command, test file, or manual validation path you used

## Docs Impact

- [ ] No docs change needed
- [ ] README
- [ ] Docs in `docs/`
- [ ] SDK docs/examples

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not bundle unrelated cleanup
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Docs were updated when setup, API behavior, or usage changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or machine-specific artifacts were committed
